name: Denjiro (Reprint)
effect_text: [DON!! x2] If your opponent has 3 or less Life cards, this Character cannot be K.O.'d by effects.[Trigger] If your opponent has 3 or less Life cards, play this card.DISCLAIMER: This card is a reprint of the pre-existing card in the OP06 set. The main difference between this card and the original print is the inclusion of "EN" on the right side, by the copyright information.
